description: Provides programmatic access to the Open Library catalog for searching books, authors, and retrieving cover images.

tools.name: get_book_by_title
tools.description: Search the Open Library catalog for books matching the provided title and return the best matches.

title.description: The book title to search for in the Open Library catalog.
The original search title used for the query.

matches.description: List of catalog entries that match the search title.

key.description: Open Library unique key for this book edition.

title.description: The title of the matched book.

author_name.description: List of author names associated with this book.

first_publish_year.description: Year of the first known publication of this work.

isbn.description: List of ISBNs linked to this edition.

cover_i.description: Internal cover image identifier used by Open Library.

tools.name: get_book_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific book using an ISBN, LCCN, OCLC, or Open Library ID.

identifier.description: The book identifier value (ISBN, LCCN, OCLC, or OLID).

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier provided: 'isbn', 'lccn', 'oclc', or 'olid'. Defaults to 'isbn'.

title.description: The full title of the book.

authors.description: List of authors credited for this work.

publishers.description: Names of publishers that released this edition.

publish_date.description: Publication date as a human-readable string.

covers.description: List of internal cover image identifiers.

identifiers.description: Dictionary mapping identifier types to their values.

key.description: Open Library unique key for this book edition.

tools.name: get_authors_by_name
tools.description: Search Open Library for authors whose names contain the provided query string.

name.description: Author name or partial name to search for.

limit.description: Maximum number of author records to return. Defaults to 10.

authors.description: List of authors matching the search query.

top_work.description: Most widely held work by this author.

work_count.description: Total number of works cataloged for this author.

count.description: Total number of authors returned in this response.

tools.name: get_author_info
tools.description: Fetch comprehensive biographical and bibliographical data for a specific author.

death_date.description: Death date in human-readable format, if applicable.

photos.description: List of internal photo identifiers for author images.

wikipedia.description: URL to the author's Wikipedia page, if available.

tools.name: get_book_cover
tools.description: Generate a direct URL to a book's cover image hosted by Open Library.

identifier.description: ISBN, OCLC, LCCN, OLID, or cover ID whose cover image is requested.

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier supplied: 'isbn', 'oclc', 'lccn', 'olid', or 'id'. Defaults to 'isbn'.

size.description: Requested cover size: 'S' (small), 'M' (medium), or 'L' (large). Defaults to 'M'.

url.description: Direct URL to the cover image on Open Library's servers.

identifier.description: The identifier value used to locate the cover.

identifier_type.description: The identifier type that was used in the request.

size.description: Size parameter used to generate the cover image URL.
